codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the architecture-hardening logging objective: previously silent exception-swallowing paths in services.py were updated to emit loguru exception logs with function/context data before fallback returns, and regression tests were added to verify representative logging behavior plus guard against reintroducing silent patterns.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker setup guidance still appears to assume .factory/init.sh is executable; in practice, workers may need to invoke it via bash.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for workerSessionId fa8cb947-fee4-4b65-8d4b-499863fa39a6 shows direct execution of /Users/jwalinshah/projects/inbox/.factory/init.sh failed with "Permission denied" (exit 126), then succeeded with `bash "/Users/jwalinshah/projects/inbox/.factory/init.sh"`.

summary: Reviewed add-structured-logging at commit 9f8e92b32a70888a341113729a708939dbe697cb. The diff aligns with the feature contract and VAL-HARD-001 intent, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects identified; one recurring shared-state/worker-procedure setup gap was noted.
